description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular blue body and a protruding red control panel. The front features a large display screen showing the Donkey Kong game, with a control panel below that includes a joystick and several colored buttons. The lower front section has a coin door and a prominent 'Donkey Kong' logo. Both side panels are decorated with vibrant Donkey Kong artwork, depicting the iconic character and game elements in a cartoon style. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or particleboard, with metal and plastic components for the controls and coin mechanism. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, with colorful graphics and a sturdy, boxy form typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A blue upright Donkey Kong arcade cabinet with colorful side artwork, a red control panel with joystick and buttons, and a front display screen showing the game.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the Donkey Kong artwork and part of the red control panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain blue panel with no artwork or features.
description_view_2: Right side view with identical Donkey Kong artwork and a glimpse of the control panel.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the game screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin door, and Donkey Kong logo.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, curved, medium size with a visible bezel typical of vintage arcade machines.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a row, set on a red panel with game-themed markings.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'Donkey Kong' logo in red and yellow with cartoon artwork of Donkey Kong and game elements, set against a colorful background.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful Donkey Kong artwork with cartoon characters and game motifs on a blue background.
